overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Elden Ring showing a cloaked character ascending through a dark gothic fortress gate with red glowing lights, then emerging into the open Stormhill area with scattered ruins and statues under a stormy red-purple sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic fortress gate with twin towers

events.description: character begins ascending the stone stairs toward the archway

agents.ego_description: walking toward the fortress and climbing the stone steps leading to the archway entrance

entered.detail: massive dark stone gate with archway and red glowing windows
tall cylindrical tower with red illuminated windows
tall cylindrical tower with red illuminated windows
multiple red lights lining the gate structure walls

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a massive gothic fortress gate flanked by twin towers with red glowing windows. The environment is dark and atmospheric as the character begins ascending the stone stairs toward the archway entrance.

events.description: character passes through the archway from the enclosed gate into the open landscape
location name 'Stormhill' appears on screen as the character emerges into the open area

agents.ego_description: passing through the dark archway and emerging into the open Stormhill plateau

entered.detail: tall thin tower visible through the archway exit against the stormy sky
scattered stone ruins and broken pillars in the open landscape

segments.scene_description: The character moves through the narrow stone archway, transitioning from the enclosed fortress into the open Stormhill area. The location name appears on screen as the character emerges onto a wide plateau with distant ruins visible under a stormy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open ruined plateau with scattered statues

events.description: character transitions from walking to running while exploring the open area

agents.ego_description: traversing the open Stormhill plateau, moving past ancient stone statues and ruins toward the distant tower

entered.detail: tall stone statues lining the left side of the path
broken stone pillars and columns on the right side
collapsed stone structures and debris across the landscape

segments.scene_description: The character explores the vast open Stormhill area, walking along a stone path flanked by ancient statues and broken pillars. The landscape is dotted with ruins under a dark stormy sky with red atmospheric effects, while the distant central tower remains visible ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the oppressive shadows of a gothic fortress into the vast, stormy expanse of the Stormhill region. It begins with the character ascending stone stairs toward a massive fortress gate flanked by twin towers with glowing red windows. As the character moves through the narrow stone archway, the enclosed darkness gives way to a wide plateau where the landscape opens up under a turbulent sky. The scene then expands across the Stormhill area, following a stone path lined with ancient statues and broken pillars. Finally, the camera tracks the character through the ruins under a red-tinted atmospheric haze, keeping a distant central tower visible on the horizon.
